description_long: This shotgun features a robust, dark metallic body with a prominent cylindrical barrel and a circular drum magazine mounted on the underside. The grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made of a synthetic or polymer material, and is attached to a solid receiver. A chain or cable is visible running along the side, possibly for securing or carrying the weapon. The top of the shotgun has a round, flat component, possibly a sight or part of the magazine mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function and durability.
description: A dark, utilitarian shotgun with a cylindrical barrel, drum magazine, and ergonomic grip, featuring a chain or cable along the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the round drum magazine beneath, with the grip partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the drum magazine, and the chain or cable running along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip and the top of the drum magazine, with minimal detail on the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grip, the length of the barrel, and the chain or cable, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
